business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas.

coverages_discussed.notes: Supplemental application includes policy number WC-HCHP-2025-3350 and prior insurance history, but no coverage limits or requested limits are stated.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior Insurance History: 2024 Travelers Companies, premium 686236.25, 11 claims, cancellations No; 2023 Markel Corporation, premium 619820.26, 3 claims, cancellations No; 2022 Zurich Insurance Group, premium 607294.45, 6 claims, cancellations Yes.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Written contracts with all subcontractors: Yes. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors: Yes. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises: Yes. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring: Yes. Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) maintained: Yes. Quality control / quality assurance program: No. OSHA citations in the past 3 years: Yes. Cyber liability protections in place: No.

concerns: Short-term rentals of less than 1 year are permitted.
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities are present.
HVAC was replaced in 2026, but plumbing and electrical are original from 2005.
Building is not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R, despite premises table showing listed locations as sprinklered.
No quality control / quality assurance program.
OSHA citations reported in the past 3 years.
No cyber liability protections in place.
Prior insurance history shows 20 claims from 2022 through 2024 and a cancellation in 2022.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history lists 20 total claims over 2022-2024: 11 claims in 2024 with Travelers Companies, 3 claims in 2023 with Markel Corporation, and 6 claims in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group. A cancellation is shown for 2022.
positives: 16 years in business and 16 years with current management.
Written contracts with subcontractors and indemnification required from contractors.
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring.
Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS) are maintained.
Premises table lists all 8 locations as sprinklered.
